SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS REATINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
